description_long: This bookcase features a striking minimalist design with a rectangular wooden base and shelf, supported by four slender black metal rods. The upper section includes a horizontal wooden bar, echoing the shelf and base, and is also held by the same metal rods, creating a visually open and airy structure. The wood has a warm, natural grain, contrasting with the sleek, matte black metal supports. The overall form is geometric and linear, with no visible fasteners or decorative elements, emphasizing function and simplicity. The open sides and back make it suitable for displaying books or decorative items in a modern urban environment. Its compact footprint and sturdy construction suggest it is intended for floor-standing use in public or semi-public spaces.
description: A minimalist, floor-standing bookcase with a wooden base and shelf, supported by black metal rods and an open, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the wooden shelf and base, with four vertical black rods and an upper wooden bar.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelf and the linear arrangement of the rods, with the wood grain visible on the surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shelf and base, with the rods and upper bar aligned in parallel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the thickness of the wood and the spacing of the rods.
